zh.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford是Sir Thomas Swynford的兒子，於1340年出生在英國林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛。他於1366年5月與Katherine de Roet在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1371年11月13日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德波迪奧享年31歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾凱特列索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford是Sir Thomas Swynford的儿子，于1340年出生在英国林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛。他于1366年5月与Katherine de Roet在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1371年11月13日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德波迪奧享年31岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾凱特列索普。

nameMeanings.name: Swynford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Kent): habitational name from Old Swinford (Worcestershire), Kingswinford (Staffordshire), Swinford (Leicestershire), Swinford in Cumnor (Berkshire), or Swinford in Hothfield (Kent), all of which are recorded Swineford or Swyneford in medieval documents. The placenames derive from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Swineford
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one of the English places that gave rise to   Swinford  .
Americanized form of German Schweinfurt(h), a habitational name from a place so named (Franconia).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford was born in 1340, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England as the son of Sir Thomas Swynford. He married Katherine de Roet in May 1366, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 13 November 1371, in Bordeaux, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 31, and was buried in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford est né en 1340, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Thomas Swynford. Il a épousé Katherine de Roet en mai 1366, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1371, à Bordeaux, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford wurde 1340 in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Thomas Swynford geboren. Er hat im Mai 1366 in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Katherine de Roet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. November 1371 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Bordeaux, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford è nato il nel 1340 nel Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England come figlio di Sir Thomas Swynford. Lui sposato Katherine de Roet nel maggio 1366, nel Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 novembre 1371, nel Bordeaux, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynfordは1340年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウでSir Thomas Swynfordの息子として生まれた。1366年5月にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでKatherine de Roetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1371年11月13日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドボルディーウックスで31歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアケットレソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford(은)는 1340년 영국 링코실르 게인스버루에서 Sir Thomas Swynford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1366년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Katherine de Roet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1371년 11월 13일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 볼도스에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 케틀레소에 묻혔다.

mn.St. Clements Danes, Westminster, Middles: Westminster, Middleseaxon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford nasceu em 1340, em Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Thomas Swynford. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Roet em maio de 1366, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1371, em Bordeaux, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford родился в 1340 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Thomas Swynford. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Roet май 1366 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 ноября 1371 г. в местности бордокс, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности кеттлетаурп, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Swynford nació en 1340, en Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Thomas Swynford. Se casó con Katherine de Roet en mayo de 1366, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1371, en Bordeaux, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
